query: Iowa tornado Local Storm Reports May 2026 count so far from IEM mesonet.agron.iastate.edu
answer:
## Iowa Tornado Local Storm Reports — May 2026 (IEM Mesonet)

Based on data from the Iowa Environmental Mesonet (IEM) at mesonet.agron.iastate.edu, here are the findings for tornado Local Storm Reports (LSRs) in Iowa during May 1–24, 2026:

### Summary

**Total tornado LSRs: 31** (covering all WFOs serving Iowa: DMX, DVN, OAX, FSD, ARX)

### Breakdown by Date
| Date | Count | Key Areas |
|------|-------|-----------|
| May 16 | 2 | Taylor County |
| May 18 | 27 | Widespread outbreak — northern & western Iowa |
| May 19 | 1 | Ringgold County |
| May 22 | 1 | Woodbury County |

### Breakdown by County (16 counties affected)
- Woodbury: 5
- Cherokee: 4
- Taylor: 4
- Cerro Gordo: 3
- Dickinson: 2
- Plymouth: 2
- Ringgold: 2
- Calhoun, Clay, Emmet, Kossuth, Palo Alto, Pocahontas, Webster, Winnebago, Worth: 1 each

### Key Notes
- The dominant event was **May 18, 2026**, which accounted for 27 of the 31 reports — a significant tornado outbreak across northern and western Iowa.
- Some reports may represent duplicates (same tornado reported by multiple sources), with an estimated 27 unique tornado events.
- Data source: IEM GeoJSON LSR endpoint filtering for tornado type across all Iowa-serving WFOs.

key_facts: Iowa recorded 31 tornado Local Storm Reports (LSRs) from May 1-24, 2026, per IEM mesonet.agron.iastate.edu
May 18, 2026 was a major tornado outbreak day with 27 of the 31 reports across northern and western Iowa
16 Iowa counties were affected by tornado reports in May 2026
Woodbury County had the most reports (5), followed by Cherokee (4) and Taylor (4)
Additional tornado days: May 16 (2 reports, Taylor Co.), May 19 (1, Ringgold Co.), May 22 (1, Woodbury Co.)
Approximately 27 unique tornado events when accounting for possible duplicate reports
